## Summary

I have successfully replaced **all hardcoded Tailwind colors** with semantic tokens in the following 5 files:

### 1. **src/widgets/NotesEditor.tsx** (8 changes)
- `hover:bg-neutral-800` → `hover:bg-surface-dark-elevated` (SlashCommandPlugin menu item hover)
- `hover:bg-neutral-800` → `hover:bg-surface-dark-elevated` (EditorToolbar button hover)
- `bg-neutral-100 dark:bg-neutral-800` → `bg-surface-light-elevated dark:bg-surface-dark-elevated` (inline code background)
- `bg-neutral-900 dark:bg-neutral-950 text-neutral-100` → `bg-surface-dark dark:bg-surface-dark-elevated text-text-dark-primary` (code block)

### 2. **src/widgets/NotesEditor/ImageNode.tsx** (2 changes)
- `hover:bg-red-500` → `hover:bg-accent-red` (delete button hover)
- `bg-black/50` → `bg-surface-dark/50` (modal overlay background)

### 3. **src/widgets/Automations/AutomationsList.tsx** (1 change)
- `bg-neutral-200 dark:bg-neutral-700` → `bg-surface-light-elevated dark:bg-surface-dark-elevated` (disabled status badge)

### 4. **src/widgets/Settings/ProjectSettings.tsx** (11 changes)
- `hover:bg-neutral-800` → `hover:bg-surface-dark-elevated` (project row hover, multiple instances)
- `bg-neutral-800` → `bg-surface-dark-elevated` (form container background)
- `ring-offset-neutral-800` → `ring-offset-surface-dark-elevated` (color picker ring offset)
- `bg-neutral-700`, `hover:bg-neutral-200`, `hover:bg-neutral-600` → semantic surface tokens (icon picker buttons)
- `hover:bg-neutral-700` → `hover:bg-surface-dark-elevated` (cancel button, expand buttons, multiple instances)
- `bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600` → `bg-accent-red hover:bg-accent-red-hover` (delete confirmation)
- `text-red-500 hover:bg-red-100/dark:hover:bg-red-900/30` → `text-accent-red hover:bg-accent-red/10 dark:hover:bg-accent-red/20` (trash icon)
- `bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-900/20 border-blue-200 dark:border-blue-800 text-blue-900 dark:text-blue-100 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-200` → `bg-accent-blue/10 dark:bg-accent-blue/20 border-accent-blue/20 dark:border-accent-blue/30 text-accent-blue text-text-light-secondary dark:text-text-dark-secondary` (info card)

### 5. **src/widgets/Settings/WidgetSettingsSection.tsx** (3 changes)
- `bg-neutral-200 dark:bg-neutral-700` → `bg-surface-light-elevated dark:bg-surface-dark-elevated` (range slider background)
- `bg-white dark:bg-neutral-900` → `bg-surface-light dark:bg-surface-dark` (all input fields, replaced 3 instances)

## Verification

✅ **TypeScript type-check**: Passed with no errors  
✅ **Production build**: Completed successfully  
✅ **Semantic token mapping**: All conversions follow the documented rules:
- Gray variants (`neutral-*`) → `surface-*` or `text-*` or `border-*`
- Red variants → `accent-red` (errors, danger, delete)
- Blue variants → `accent-blue` (info, highlights)
- Black backgrounds → `surface-dark`

All changes maintain visual consistency while ensuring the codebase adheres to the semantic token system defined in `tailwind.config.js`.
